rationale: Educ. Code §1.006 governs the Education Research Center Advisory Board's composition and approval of research proposals. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: The commissioner of higher education shall create, chair, and maintain an advisory board for the purpose of reviewing study or evaluation proposals and ensuring appropriate data use under Section 1.005
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this education research advisory board statute.
